data.title: Levi Strauss picks SCAYLE as global ecommerce platform provider
data.description: SCAYLE was originally developed by European online fashion retailer Zalando to support its own large-scale digital commerce operations before being commercialized as a standalone platform used by global brands and retailers.

data.title: FedEx introduces reusable shipping boxes for B2B shipments
data.description: The system is designed for “closed-loop” shipping environments where packaging can be consistently returned to the sender.

data.title: Sally Beauty, Circana agree on multiyear supply chain solution deal
data.description: Circana said the strategic partnership focuses on an "advanced technology platform" to improve business-planning capabilities. It said the collaboration includes a "comprehensive" supply chain insights platform that provides daily updates to "critical operational data" for suppliers.

data.title: Amazon opens up new AI-enabled Buy for Me, Shop Direct options for merchants
data.description: Third-party feeds will supply updated product info to Shop Direct results, even from merchants that do not otherwise sell through Amazon.

data.title: Mastercard introduces AI ‘virtual c-suite’ to help small businesses
data.description: The launch is part of Mastercard’s broader effort to expand beyond payments processing into software, data and advisory services as financial technology companies increasingly integrate artificial intelligence into commerce and financial management systems.
